steps.t: Rations can be found throughout the main level of Lûghash. Freki has asked you to gather rations for the exhausted smiths of Lûghash. You should gathe…
Stout-axe smiths can be found on the lower level of Lûghash. You have gathered several rations and should now deliver them to the Stout-axe smiths in …
Freki can be found on the main level of Lûghash. You have delivered rations to many of the Stout-axe smiths in Lûghash and should now return to Freki.
